docstrings.ImagesPipeline.convert_image: Convert the image to the desired size and format, using the response_body.
docstrings.ImagesPipeline.file_downloaded: Handle the file_downloaded signal, processing the response, request, info, and item.
docstrings.ImagesPipeline.file_path: Generate a file path from the request, response, info, and item.
docstrings.ImagesPipeline.from_crawler: Create an instance of the pipeline from the crawler.
docstrings.ImagesPipeline.get_images: Retrieve images from the response, request, info, and item.
docstrings.ImagesPipeline.get_media_requests: Generate media requests based on the item and info.
docstrings.ImagesPipeline.image_downloaded: Process the downloaded image, using the response, request, info, and item to store the result.
docstrings.ImagesPipeline.item_completed: Handle the item_completed signal, updating the item with results and info.
docstrings.ImagesPipeline.thumb_path: Generate a thumbnail path from the request, thumb_id, response, info, and item.
